creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, it does. In Debian-live 12.9 for `dmesg | grep hda` I'm getting:

[    2.138736] pci 0000:01:00.0: optimus capabilities: enabled, status dynamic power, hda bios codec supported
[    5.683723] snd_hda_intel 0000:00:1f.3: DSP detected with PCI class/subclass/prog-if info 0x040100
[    5.683803] snd_hda_intel 0000:00:1f.3: SoundWire enabled on CannonLake+ platform, using SOF driver
[    5.935578] sof-audio-pci-intel-tgl 0000:00:1f.3: hda codecs found, mask 4
[    6.295935] sof_sdw sof_sdw: hda_dsp_hdmi_build_controls: no PCM in topology for HDMI converter 3
